inputs.text: Bachha ko bahut bukhaar hai, thakaan mehsoos ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue, generic viral presentation

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Could be an early sign of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely at this stage, more symptoms needed to confirm

inputs.text: Bachhe ko sookhi khaansi ho rahi hai, bukhaar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent dry cough, more likely to be bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still less likely, need more symptoms to confirm

inputs.text: Bachhe ko raat ko pasina aata hai, khaansi abhi bhi hai, aur wazan bhi kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona, and persistent cough, all pointing towards Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as symptoms are more severe than expected for bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Bachha bahut kamzor ho gaya hai, khaansi mein khoon bhi aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness, blood in sputum, all confirm Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms are more severe than expected for bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms and progression do not match pneumonia
